channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: Solitary Rectal Ulcer Syndrome Revisited: A Comprehensive Narrative Review.
item.description: Current gastroenterology reports - Review - Solitary rectal ulcer syndrome (SRUS) is a gastrointestinal disorder with a varied range of clinical, endoscopic and histological features. It is often misdiagnosed as inflammatory bowel disease or...

item.title: Study on the effect of Portulaca oleracea L. extract on chronic ulcerative colitis in rats induced by allogeneic antigen and acetic acid.
item.description: Acta cirurgica brasileira - To investigate the effect and mechanism of Portulaca oleracea L. (POL) extract on acetic acid and alloantigen-induced chronic ulcerative colitis in rats. Ulcerative colitis was induced in rats by s...

item.title: Periodontal Disease and Cardiovascular Risk Factors.
item.description: Current vascular pharmacology - Various studies have suggested a bidirectional association between periodontal disease and systemic health conditions. Periodontitis is caused by polymicrobial infection, and it affects 7 - 11% of ...

item.title: osr1 as a Novel Marker for ICC-Like Cells Development in Zebrafish.
item.description: Cell biology international - Interstitial cells of Cajal (ICCs) are essential for maintaining normal intestinal function, and their dysfunction is closely associated with various gastrointestinal diseases. However, the develop...
